name: Bug Report
about: Report a bug to help us improve Harmony
title: '[BUG] '
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## Bug Description

A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## Steps to Reproduce

1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. Scroll down to '...'
4. See error

## Expected Behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior

What actually happened.

## Screenshots

If applicable, add screenshots to help explain your problem.

## Environment

- **Deployment Type**: [Docker / Manual / Tauri desktop / Other]
- **Browser**: [e.g. Chrome 120, Firefox 115] (if web)
- **OS**: [e.g. Windows 11, macOS 14, Linux]
- **Harmony Version / commit**: [e.g. 0.1.0 or git SHA]
- **Node Version**: [e.g. 20.10.0]

## Console Errors

```
Paste any console errors here
```

## Additional Context

Add any other context about the problem here.

## Possible Solution

If you have suggestions on how to fix the bug, please describe them here.
